title: myriopus suffruticosus
intro: Myriopus suffruticosus, also known as California pepperweed or California geranium, is a perennial herb in the borage family native to the western coast of North America. The plant's leaves and stems contain bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenes, which possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Myriopus suffruticosus include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Myriopus suffruticosus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for easy incorporation into a wellness routine.
